news.t: Vanguard announces fee cuts for nearly 100 funds, including ETFs with billions of dollars in assets

overview.description: The Vanguard Emerging Markets Government Bond ETF (VWOB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of emerging market sovereign debt, denominated in USD. VWOB was launched on May 31, 2013 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: Bloomberg USD Emerging Markets Government RIC Capped Bond

data.title: Vanguard announces fee cuts for nearly 100 funds, including ETFs with billions of dollars in assets
data.text: The asset manager said this is its biggest fee cut ever and will save investors about $350 million this year.
